No explicit depreciation or amortization row is labelled as belonging to COGS/cost of revenues, and the visible D&A lines appear as separate operating expense items outside the purchases bucket. To avoid double counting and unsupported allocation, no COGS-specific D&A row should be added separately.

The special R&D rule also supports inclusion because the mapped R&D expense row is not an above-operating-profit row in this excerpt.
